overall.description: A static first-person view from a futuristic cyberpunk apartment bedroom, looking out a large panoramic window at a foggy, overcast cityscape. Occasional flying vehicles pass by the window while the camera remains stationary, capturing the moody blue-gray atmosphere typical of high-end game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: flying vehicle passes by the window from left to right
two flying vehicles pass by the window sequentially

agents.ego_description: stationary on the bed, gazing out at the foggy cityscape through the panoramic window

notable_agents.action: flying car moves horizontally across the window view at approximately 5 seconds
pair of flying vehicles traverse the window view at approximately 29 seconds

entered.detail: unmade bed with rumpled white and silver satin sheets in the immediate foreground
dark wall covered in small square mosaic tiles with varied dark tones
floor-to-ceiling window revealing the foggy cityscape outside
rectangular overhead light panel emitting soft white illumination
barely visible silhouettes of distant towers and buildings shrouded in heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The scene opens and maintains a static view from a futuristic apartment bedroom, with rumpled silver sheets on the bed in the foreground and a large panoramic window revealing a foggy, overcast city. The room features dark mosaic tile walls and soft artificial lighting from above. Throughout the segment, flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window, momentarily breaking the stillness of the atmospheric, cyberpunk-inspired setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective from within a futuristic bedroom overlooking a moody, overcast cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with a focus on the immediate interior, where rumpled silver sheets rest in the foreground against dark mosaic tile walls illuminated by soft artificial light. As the gaze extends toward the large panoramic window, the view opens up to a dense, foggy urban expanse shrouded in blue-gray tones. The stillness of the scene is then periodically interrupted as flying vehicles glide past the glass, momentarily cutting through the haze before the environment returns to its quiet, brooding state.
